prompt: I'm building a feature engineering pipeline for crypto prediction and I need to detect US and UK holidays in my time-series data so I can add is_us_holiday and is_uk_holiday columns. I also want a is_major_holiday flag for days when BOTH NYSE and LSE are closed. Don't want to maintain a manual holiday list — need something that stays current. What's the best approach?

assertions.text: Uses exchange_calendars regular_holidays API (not a manual list or holidays pip package)
References correct MIC codes: XNYS for NYSE and XLON for LSE
Shows the major_holiday = both NYSE AND LSE closed pattern
Holiday detection excludes weekends (only counts official exchange closures)
